---
name: Threat model attack
about: Propose an attack the threat model does not cover, or argue a control is insufficient
title: "[ATTACK] "
labels: threat-model
---

**Target**
Which abuse case, control, or trust assumption are you attacking? If it is a new abuse case, say so.

**Attack narrative**
Describe the attack step by step. A coherent argument is enough; no proof of concept required.

**Impact if successful**

**Why existing controls fail (or are missing)**

**Credit**
Do you want to be credited in the changelog? Yes / No
